db:select.doc:name: Select evaluations
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id, student_id, course_code, status FROM evaluations WHERE (:studentId = '' OR student_id = :studentId) AND (:evalStatus = '' OR status = :evalStatus) ORDER BY updated_at DESC

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload map ((r) -> { evaluationId: r.id, studentId: r.student_id, status: r.status, courseCode: r.course_code })]
set-payload.doc:name: To EvaluationSummary

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: 'ERR', service: 'evaluation', errorType: (if (error.errorType != null) ((error.errorType.namespace default '') ++ ':' ++ (error.errorType.identifier default '')) else 'N/A'), message: error.description default '', cause: (error.cause.message default '') as String, rootCause: (if (error.cause != null and error.cause.cause != null) (error.cause.cause.message default '') else '') as String }]
set-payload.doc:name: JSON error detalle

db:insert.doc:name: Insert evaluation
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO evaluations (id, student_id, course_code, status, score, comments) VALUES (:id, :studentId, :courseCode, 'DRAFT', NULL, :comments)

db:select.doc:name: Select creada
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id, student_id, course_code, status, score, comments, updated_at FROM evaluations WHERE id = :id

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- using (row = payload[0]) { evaluationId: row.id, studentId: row.student_id, courseCode: row.course_code, status: row.status, score: if (row.score == null) null else (row.score as Number), comments: row.comments default "", updatedAt: if (row.updated_at == null) null else (row.updated_at as String) }]
set-payload.doc:name: Map row to Evaluation

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: 'ERR', service: 'evaluation', errorType: (if (error.errorType != null) ((error.errorType.namespace default '') ++ ':' ++ (error.errorType.identifier default '')) else 'N/A'), message: error.description default '', cause: (error.cause.message default '') as String, rootCause: (if (error.cause != null and error.cause.cause != null) (error.cause.cause.message default '') else '') as String }]
set-payload.doc:name: JSON error detalle

db:select.doc:name: Select by id
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id, student_id, course_code, status, score, comments, updated_at FROM evaluations WHERE id = :id

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- using (row = payload[0]) { evaluationId: row.id, studentId: row.student_id, courseCode: row.course_code, status: row.status, score: if (row.score == null) null else (row.score as Number), comments: row.comments default "", updatedAt: if (row.updated_at == null) null else (row.updated_at as String) }]
set-payload.doc:name: Evaluation JSON

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: 'NOT_FOUND', message: 'EvaluaciÃ³n no encontrada' }]
set-payload.doc:name: Error JSON

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: 'ERR', service: 'evaluation', errorType: (if (error.errorType != null) ((error.errorType.namespace default '') ++ ':' ++ (error.errorType.identifier default '')) else 'N/A'), message: error.description default '', cause: (error.cause.message default '') as String, rootCause: (if (error.cause != null and error.cause.cause != null) (error.cause.cause.message default '') else '') as String }]
set-payload.doc:name: JSON error detalle

db:select.doc:name: Select actual
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id, student_id, course_code, status, score, comments, updated_at FROM evaluations WHERE id = :id

db:update.doc:name: Update evaluation
db:update.db:sql: UPDATE evaluations SET status = :status, score = :score, comments = :comments, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = :id

db:select.doc:name: Select tras update
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id, student_id, course_code, status, score, comments, updated_at FROM evaluations WHERE id = :id

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- using (row = payload[0]) { evaluationId: row.id, studentId: row.student_id, courseCode: row.course_code, status: row.status, score: if (row.score == null) null else (row.score as Number), comments: row.comments default "", updatedAt: if (row.updated_at == null) null else (row.updated_at as String) }]
set-payload.doc:name: Evaluation JSON

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: 'NOT_FOUND', message: 'EvaluaciÃ³n no encontrada' }]
set-payload.doc:name: Error JSON

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: 'ERR', service: 'evaluation', errorType: (if (error.errorType != null) ((error.errorType.namespace default '') ++ ':' ++ (error.errorType.identifier default '')) else 'N/A'), message: error.description default '', cause: (error.cause.message default '') as String, rootCause: (if (error.cause != null and error.cause.cause != null) (error.cause.cause.message default '') else '') as String }]
set-payload.doc:name: JSON error detalle

db:select.doc:name: Select by id
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id FROM evaluations WHERE id = :id

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: 'NOT_FOUND', message: 'EvaluaciÃ³n no encontrada' }]
set-payload.doc:name: Error JSON

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: 'ERR', service: 'evaluation', errorType: (if (error.errorType != null) ((error.errorType.namespace default '') ++ ':' ++ (error.errorType.identifier default '')) else 'N/A'), message: error.description default '', cause: (error.cause.message default '') as String, rootCause: (if (error.cause != null and error.cause.cause != null) (error.cause.cause.message default '') else '') as String }]
set-payload.doc:name: JSON error detalle
